content.title: onsemi Introduces Industry-First Elite Pairing Studio to Simplify Power Design
content.summary: onsemi Introduces Industry-First Elite Pairing Studio to Simplify Power Design The onsemi Elite Pairing Studio is an online design environment that simplifies pairing SiC MOSFETs and gate drivers for demanding power electronics applications, including AI data centers, electric vehicles, and industrial systems. By providing visibility into device level behavior and pairing trade offs, the Studio enables earlier, better-informed engineering decisions and helps reduce design iterations. The Elite P

thumbnail.caption: The onsemi Elite Pairing Studio is an online design environment that simplifies pairing SiC MOSFETs and gate drivers for demanding power electronics applications, including AI data centers, electric vehicles, and industrial systems. By providing visibility into device level behavior and pairing trade offs, the Studio enables earlier, better-informed engineering decisions and helps reduce design iterations. The Elite Pairing Studio serves as the front door to onsemi’s broader suite of design tools, enabling a seamless path to system level evaluation of performance, efficiency, and thermal behavior.
